data.name: 魅魔咖啡廳
data.detailed_description:
NEW GAME!


💟CHECK THIS OUT!💟


關於此遊戲

魅魔咖啡廳一共有三位女孩，莉莉絲、伊謝絲、艾莉絲。
這間咖啡廳只有在夜晚才會營業，她們將會服務前來的客人，
並製造一個美好的回憶給客戶，您可以選擇指定的女孩替您服務。

在服務之前，可以自訂女孩的穿搭，包含服裝、頭飾、配件、臉妝等等。
服務期間，您可以選擇另一位女孩進行3P，每一種體位都有不同的服務動作，也可以搭配道具和女孩們進行互動。

本作品繼承了前作的淫語系統、剖面圖
淫語系統:
在聲音上有製作了主(副)聲音的通道，淫語開啟時，其餘的聲音會變小，而將淫語關閉時，其餘的聲音會恢復正常，讓玩家能專心在一個聲音上。

剖面圖:
本作品將剖面圖改為3D呈現，並且加入了內射的效果。

語音:
支援 英文和日文發音，包含叫聲、淫語、所有對話。

字幕:
支援 英文、日文、繁體中文、簡體中文。

人物:
魅魔的年紀只要超過18歲之後...外表就會永遠保持在18歲了，所以三位女孩都是成年人。

data.short_description: 魅魔咖啡廳一共有三位女孩，莉莉絲、伊謝絲、艾莉絲 這間咖啡廳只有在夜晚才會營業，她們將會服務前來的客人， 並製造一個美好的回憶給客戶，您可以選擇指定的女孩替您服務。 魅魔的年紀只要超過18歲之後...就永遠是18歲了，所以三位女孩都是成年人。 遊戲有兩種語音，英文和日文，支援的字幕和介面為，英文、日文、繁體中文、簡體中文。
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 日文*, 簡體中文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: window7,window10
  • 處理器: Intel,Amd
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1050
  • 儲存空間: 9 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: window7,window10
  • 處理器: Intel,Amd
  • 記憶體: 10 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1080
  • 儲存空間: 9 GB 可用空間

data.name: Succubus Cafe
data.detailed_description:
NEW GAME!


💟CHECK THIS OUT!💟


About the Game

There are three girls at Succubus Café: Lilith, Eisheth, and Alice.
The cafe only opens at night and customers are served by the girls.
The girls provide customers with a wonderful experience. You can choose a girl to serve you.

The girl's outfit including clothing, hair decoration, accessories and make-up can be customized in advance.
You can also select another girl to 3P with. Different motions are available for each position. Props can be used for interactions with the girls as well.

This game retains the Dirty Talk system and Cutaway View of its predecessor.
Dirty Talk system:
Audio includes primary (auxiliary) voice channels. When Dirty Talk is enabled, all other sound effects become muted. When Dirty Talk is disabled, all other sounds revert to normal so that the player can concentrate on one sound at a time.

Cutaway View:
In this game, cutaway view is now show in 3D and includes internal ejaculation effects.

Audio Language:
English and Japanese audio supported. This includes all moaning, dirty talk and conversations.

Subtitles:
Supports English, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, and Simplified Chinese.

Characters:
Once a succubus reaches 18 years of age… She will always look 18. All three girls are therefore adults.

Game audio is available in English and Japanese. Subtitles and user interface can be in English, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, or Simplified Chinese.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: window7,window10
  • Processor: Intel,Amd
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GTX 1050
  • Storage: 9 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: window7,window10
  • Processor: Intel,Amd
  • Memory: 10 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GTX 1080
  • Storage: 9 GB available space
